mapper.select: SELECT ROUND(rating) AS "rating" , COUNT(*) AS "cnt" FROM t_review WHERE rating IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ROUND(rating) ORDER BY ROUND(rating)
SELECT sentiment AS "sentiment" , COUNT(*) AS "cnt" FROM t_review WHERE sentiment IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sentiment ORDER BY "cnt" DESC
SELECT skin_tone AS "skinTone" , COUNT(*) AS "cnt" FROM t_review WHERE skin_tone IS NOT NULL GROUP BY skin_tone ORDER BY "cnt" DESC

SELECT p.brand_name AS "brandName" , ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 2) AS "avgRating" , COUNT(r.review_id) AS "reviewCount" FROM t_product p JOIN t_review r ON p.product_id = r.product_id GROUP BY p.brand_name HAVING COUNT(r.review_id) >= 5 ORDER BY "avgRating" DESC
SELECT p.brand_name AS "brandName" , COUNT(r.review_id) AS "reviewCount" FROM t_product p JOIN t_review r ON p.product_id = r.product_id GROUP BY p.brand_name ORDER BY "reviewCount" DESC
